ticket.title: FIX INFORMATION CONFLICTS AND FORMATTING ERRORS BETWEEN BOOKING SYSTEM AND SOA LEDGERS

test_cases.description: Verify contact number is consistent between the booking system and Booking Confirmation SOA.
test_cases.expected_result: Contact number on the Booking Confirmation SOA should match the booking system record (09876543213).
test_cases.actual_result: Contact number displayed as 9876543123, mismatching the correct 09876543213.
test_cases.comments: Mismatch found: 9876543123 vs correct 09876543213 on other SOA versions. Returned to dev.

test_cases.description: Verify Total Amount calculation includes the service fee.
test_cases.expected_result: Total Amount should include the P162.50 service fee.
test_cases.actual_result: Total Amount excluded the P162.50 service fee, resulting in an understated total.
test_cases.comments: Php 162.50 service fee excluded from total. Returned to dev.

test_cases.description: Verify Total Amount calculation includes the service fee.
test_cases.expected_result: Total Amount should include the P162.50 service fee.
test_cases.actual_result: Total Amount excluded the service fee, same defect as B2B Download SOA.
test_cases.comments: Same service fee exclusion issue as B2B Download SOA. Returned to dev.

test_cases.description: Verify installment split totals reconcile with the full booking amount.
test_cases.expected_result: Sum of installment splits should equal the full booking amount exactly.
test_cases.actual_result: Installment split showed a P0.50 shortfall against the full booking amount.
test_cases.comments: Php 0.50 shortfall found in installment split. Returned to dev.

test_cases.description: Verify contact number consistency across all SOA versions (Booking Confirmation, B2B, B2C, Updated).
test_cases.expected_result: Contact number should be identical across all SOA versions.
test_cases.actual_result: Cross-system check; mismatch isolated to Booking Confirmation SOA only.
test_cases.comments: Cross-system check; mismatch isolated to Booking Confirmation SOA only.

test_cases.description: Verify currency and decimal formatting is consistent across all SOA types.
test_cases.expected_result: Currency values should follow consistent decimal/format conventions across all SOA types.
test_cases.actual_result: Formatting inconsistencies found alongside the Total Amount defects.
test_cases.comments: Formatting check; found alongside the Total Amount defects.
